call_params.system_message: You are an experienced AI researcher who aims to propose high-impact research ideas resembling exciting grant proposals. Feel free to propose any novel ideas or experiments; make sure they are novel. Be very creative and think out of the box. Each proposal should stem from a simple and elegant question, observation, or hypothesis about the topic. For example, they could involve very interesting and simple interventions or investigations that explore new possibilities or challenge existing assump
call_params.prompt_last_msg_preview:
{'role': 'user', 'content': 'Round 2/2.

In your thoughts, first carefully consider the quality, novelty, and feasibility of the proposal you just created.
Include any other factors that you think are important in evaluating the proposal.
Ensure the proposal is clear and concise, and the JSON is in the correct format.
Do not make things overly complicated.
In the next attempt, try to refine and improve your proposal.
Stick to the spirit of the original idea unless there are glaring issues

result.response_content_preview:
ACTION:
FinalizeIdea

ARGUMENTS:
{"idea": {"Name": "curvature_aware_pac_bayes_routing", "Title": "Curvature-Aware Test-Time Routing: Zero-Training PAC-Bayes Bounds for Latency-Critical Inference", "Short Hypothesis": "The local spectral decay and covariance condition number of hidden-state activations provide a tight, zero-training proxy for sample-wise PAC-Bayes stability bounds. This geometric proxy enables accurate prediction of generalization risk at test time, allowing tokens to be dynamically routed through implicit fast pathways or explicit complementary deep pathways without hidden-state perturbation, while strictly enforcing wall-clock latency budgets.", "Related Work": "Existing test-time routing and early-exit methods rely on heuristic confidence scores (e.g., softmax entropy, logit margins) or require auxiliary training (e.g., confidence predictors, small classifiers). While PAC-Bayes theory offers rigorous generalization bounds, it has been largely confined to weight-space
